---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / motivation**
What can't you do today, or what's awkward? Link to the README roadmap item if it
maps to one (configurable bins, vertical stacking, longitudinal trim, etc.).

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. For algorithm changes, note how it affects stability
(CG/GM) and packing.

**Alternatives considered**

**Scope check**
- [ ] Keeps the project dependency-free (pure C, no third-party libraries)
- [ ] Can be covered by a test (invariant or hand-computed value)
